channel.title: Challenge on DotKsp Writings
channel.description: Recent content in Challenge on DotKsp Writings

item.title: I Did 100 Push-Ups Every Day for 60 Days ; My Body Before and After
item.description: Sixty days. 6,000 push-ups. Here is what happened to my body : and my mind.

item.title: I Lived on $5 a Day for 30 Days ; Here's What I Learned
item.description: I lived on $5 a day for a month. It wasn't about the money : it was about the control.
